name: Swordfish Kebabs
method: Serves 6 1 kg swordfish, cut into 2.5 cm cubes fresh bay leaves MARINADE 2 cloves garlic 1 chilli sea salt flakes juice of ½ organic lemon 250 ml good-quality virgin olive oil Salsa Verde
In a mortar, mix all the marinade ingredients together well. Pour this marinade over the fish skewers and let rest for about 15 minutes.
